while they're surfing the dunes?

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:257]>Hey! You! You look like you've done your
fair share of exploring!

Have you ever seen massive ruins with
<Color=red>huge statues facing each other<Color=white>? It'd be...
in the eastern part of the desert, I think?
I lost my map, so I don't know exactly
where they are...

<unk[3:0:263]>Does that sound familiar?<unk[5:0]> If you know
what I'm talking about, I'd appreciate it if
you could take me there on a <Color=red>sleigh seal<Color=white>.
<unk[3:0:264]>Exploration expenses were paid in
advance, so I'd obviously reward you if
you helped me!
